workflow_context: These integration tests cover the full Phase 1.5 → Phase 1.75 handoff inside the Tempo release notes workflow (.agents/doc-agents/shared/release-notes-workflow.md). The agent runs docs-pr-check first, then uses that output as the input to docs-pr-write without human re-entry of the handoff data.

pr_selection.note: Select a mixed set of 3 PRs: one that needs docs, one that needs a docs update, and one that requires no docs. See README.md pre-flight section for the full selection process.

evals.pr_type: Three merged PRs covering different classification outcomes: one user-facing feature with no docs (Docs needed), one PR with changed behavior where partial docs exist (Docs update needed), and one internal-only change (No docs required). Select each from a different area of the codebase.
evals.pr_selection_command: gh pr list --repo grafana/tempo --state merged --limit 100 --json number,title,author,labels,files | jq '[.[] | select(.author.login != "dependabot[bot]" and .author.login != "github-actions[bot]")] | .[0:20]'
evals.prompt_template: We're working on the Tempo release notes. Phase 1 is complete. Run Phase 1.5 (docs-pr-check) on this curated PR list: #{PR_1}, #{PR_2}, #{PR_3}. Then immediately run Phase 1.75 (docs-pr-write) for any PRs that need documentation work. Target branch is main.
evals.expected_output: Phase 1.5 produces a classification table and gap summary. At least one PR is flagged for docs work; at least one is not. Phase 1.75 runs docs-pr-write using the Phase 1.5 output as its handoff — without requiring the user to re-enter it. The final output includes: (1) the docs-pr-check classification table, (2) the docs-pr-write 'Files changed' list for PRs that needed docs work, (3) a PR-to-doc mapping for those PRs, and (4) an 'Open items' section.
assertions: Phase 1.5 output includes a classification table with all three PRs
Any PR classified as 'No docs required' is excluded from Phase 1.75
Phase 1.75 runs automatically using the Phase 1.5 gap summary as input (no re-entry needed)
Final output includes 'Files changed' listing docs paths for each PR that Phase 1.75 processed
PR-to-doc mapping covers exactly the PRs that Phase 1.75 processed
Output includes an 'Open items' section from docs-pr-write
Phase 1.5 and Phase 1.75 outputs are clearly labeled so the release notes writer can tell them apart
